## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (all 142+)
- [ ] `.env` not committed
- [ ] No secrets in code or logs
- [ ] Preview/demo mode still works (`APP_PREVIEW_MODE=true`)
- [ ] Migration added if schema changed (`prisma/migrations/`)
- [ ] `docs/` updated if behaviour changed
